name: Premium Trial — Your picked designs, free with your trial (personalized, automated)
subject: The designs you picked are free with your trial
preheader: Remember the designs that caught your eye? They're unlocked.
note: Personalized Day 3 replacement for contacts WITH gf_design_preferences (workflow branch). HubL renders one card per selected design; design_catalog.json is the slug->title/image map source. VERIFY HubL renders via preview-as-contact before wiring into the workflow.
